maintenance.description: Sustainable baseline events like ordinary walking or trivial upkeep.

light.description: Repeatable light commitments that still carry real metabolic weight.

standard.description: Default committed tactical events that pressure sustain over a few beats.

heavy.description: Burst actions that buy extra outcome now at clear reserve and exhaustion cost.

redline.description: Crisis-only actions that belong in overdrive or late-game superhuman play.
